'''Ilko Deminar''' was the head of the [[Cryptanalysis Department]] and [[Sub-Director]] of the [[Senate Bureau of Intelligence/Legends|Senate Bureau of Intelligence]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The [[ILKO]] code may have been named after him.

==Appearances==
*{{InsiderCite|65|Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 14:2:12}} {{1st}}
